title: "assertStrictJsonValue()"
description: "Validate and normalize a host value into strict canonical JSON data."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Validate and normalize a host value into strict canonical JSON data.

## Import

```ts
import { assertStrictJsonValue } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function assertStrictJsonValue(
	value: unknown,
	label = "strictJsonValue",
): StrictJsonValue
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `value` | `unknown` | Unknown value to check or decode. |
| `label` | `unknown` | label value used by the helper. |

## Returns

The narrowed, validated value.

## Example

```ts
import { assertStrictJsonValue } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

`packages/ts/src/json/codec.ts`
